bot.intro: Track champion performance, player rankings, live matches, and meta trends across every tier and region—without making your squad leave Discord.
bot.previewDetails: Level · XP · ranked KBM/controller · win rate · KDA · DPM/HPM/MPM/EGPM
bot.previewHint: Type a name or player ID. PaladinsCat handles the rest.
bot.featuresTitle: Useful answers, without the tab switching
bot.featuresIntro: PaladinsCat turns the same trusted data behind the website into fast, readable Discord responses.
bot.featurePlayerBody: See account level and XP, total record, global KDA, KBM and controller ranks, playtime, mastery, and per-minute performance.
bot.featureMatchBody: Turn any match ID into an optimized two-team image, complete with a link to the full match page.
bot.featureLiveBody: Check a player's active map, queue, region, team rosters, ranks, and estimated team win chances when a live snapshot is available.
bot.featurePrepBody: Choose a player and champion, select one of up to 25 saved decks, and generate a shareable loadout image.
bot.commandsIntro: Every feature uses Discord's native slash commands. Champion fields autocomplete, while ranked reports require an explicit lobby range.
bot.commandHelp: Open a private index of the nine data commands.
bot.commandPlayer: Show account details, career record, KBM and controller ranks, global KDA, and performance metrics.
bot.commandMatch: Render a cached two-team match image and link to the full match page.
bot.commandHistory: List ten recent matches with result, map, duration, region, champion, K/D/A, and match links.
bot.commandCurrent: Show an active map, queue, region, both teams, ranks, and estimated win chances when available.
bot.commandLoadouts: Choose a player and champion, then select and render one of up to 25 saved loadouts.
bot.commandChampion: Use champion autocomplete and a required lobby range to compare record, average tier, performance percentiles, and top talents.
bot.commandMaps: Review every ranked map by matches played, map-pool share, and average duration.
bot.commandComposition: See the five most-played ranked team compositions and their win rates.
bot.commandItems: Compare the top 20 ranked items by usage, pick rate, and win rate for a required lobby range.
bot.privacyTitle: Application commands only. No server permissions requested.
bot.privacyBody: The current Discord installation requests only the applications.commands scope. PaladinsCat uses the standard Guilds intent and does not request message-content, presence, or member intents.
bot.permissionNoChat: No message-content or privileged gateway intents
bot.finalBody: Install PaladinsCat for a server or add it to your own Discord apps, then type /help for the current command index.
bot.finalNote: Server installation requires permission to add apps. User installation adds PaladinsCat to your personal Discord apps.
